# Duely - Lightweight Collections Management

## What is Duely?
Duely is a lightweight collections management tool built specifically for modern service businesses. It bridges the gap between sending an invoice and actually getting paid. 

Key features include:
- Track outstanding balances across your client base
- Log partial payments
- Record client payment promises and deadlines
- Draft professional follow-up messages
- Add internal client notes
- Send automated payment reminders with payment links

## Who is it for?
Duely is designed exclusively for independent professionals and small teams, including:
- Freelancers
- Small agency owners
- Independent consultants

## Important Links
- Homepage: https://duely.in
- About Duely: https://duely.in/about
- Articles Library: https://duely.in/articles
